objective: Move Helixion/JOC/dAimon recovery back into the existing 8765 Codex/JOC cockpit shell instead of continuing the failed 8788 React prototype path.
operator_context: Operator approved recovery and asked to proceed after identifying that the previous implementation ignored JOC page/drawer canon and created a monolithic panel board.

changes.change: Replaced external 8788 JOC DEV and DOCS/PKG top-bar chips with canonical in-shell top pages: Chat, JOC, Queue, Codex, Extension, Docs, Projects, WisdomNET, Gates, Receipts, and Settings.
Added focused candidate main pages for JOC recovery, queue carrier, Codex/Capsule, dAimon extension, Docs/Packages, Projects, WisdomNET, and Gates/Recovery using the existing 8765 shell zones.
Adjusted top page tab CSS to support a larger canonical page set without clipping into a hidden monolith.

architecture.failed_surface_status: http://127.0.0.1:8788/helixion/development remains candidate/provisional and is no longer the primary recovery target.
architecture.rule: Top bar selects one focused main page; left drawer and right inspector carry page-local tools/proof instead of stacking everything on one page.

quarantine.meaning: Prior 8788/React UI work remains candidate inventory only and is not accepted product UI.

validation.reason: Operator did not request tests/reload; this pass applied bounded recovery edits only.

non_claims: This does not finish the Docs/Packages feature.
This does not finish the dAimon extension feature.
This does not claim the page visuals are final.
This does not claim the 8765 service has reloaded the changed renderer.
This does not authorize live browser control, silent send, production mutation, credentials, purchases, or destructive actions.
